title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Coursera India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
